examples.title: Apply an auto‑filter to data in an XLSX workbook to enable dynamic row and column filtering.
Identify appropriate scenarios for applying enumerators when processing XLSX files during data extraction and manipulation in .NET applications.
Implement an enumerator to iterate over rows in an XLSX worksheet efficiently, supporting lazy loading and memory optimization.
Import data from a GridView control into an XLSX workbook, preserving cell formatting and structure.
Insert a threaded comment into an XLSX workbook loaded in memory using the .NET spreadsheet library.
Programmatically retrieve the creation timestamp metadata of each threaded comment within an XLSX workbook.
Convert an Excel workbook to PDF using XLSX as the input and PDF as the output.
Convert an Excel workbook to XPS using XLSX as the input and XPS as the output.
